content.content: Summarize the content of all the websites posted to the 'general' channel and post the summary to 'random' channel.

args.body: Today’s #general links covered two main themes: a mixed U.S. jobs update, with unemployment dipping to 7.2% but labor-market concerns remaining, and a feature on a cozy Zurich restaurant highlighting authentic Swiss cuisine and alpine ambiance. Overall: economy/news and food/travel vibes.
